2605.23344.title: CHASD: Language Increment-Calibrated Contrastive Decoding against Hallucination in LVLMs
2605.23344.paper_summary: Large Vision-Language Models have shown strong multimodal reasoning capabilities, yet they remain susceptible to object hallucinations when language priors dominate insufficient or misaligned visual evidence. Training-free contrastive decoding methods mitigate this issue by comparing predictions from original and perturbed visual inputs, but existing approaches either apply global perturbations that may alter useful visual evidence or invoke an additional negative branch at every decoding step. In this paper, we observe that hallucination risks are transient and token-specific: visual attention shifts across generated tokens, while some functional tokens are produced with high confidence and do not require contrastive calibration. Based on this observation, we propose Contrastive Hallucination-Aware Step-wise Decoding (CHASD) for Large Vision-Language Models, an inference-time framework for "calibration on demand". CHASD uses an uncertainty-driven confidence gate to activate the contrastive branch only when the maximum probability of the next-token is less than the threshold, and constructs the negative branch through attention-guided localized perturbations of the currently salient visual tokens. This design reduces unnecessary negative-branch forward passes while preserving the original distribution for high-confidence steps. Experiments on POPE, AMBER, MME, MMHal-Bench, and CHAIR show that CHASD improves hallucination-related metrics over strong training-free baselines with competitive inference efficiency.
2605.23344.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺-語言模型展現了強大的多模態推理能力，然而當語言先驗主導不足或不對齊的視覺證據時，它們仍然容易出現物體幻覺。無需訓練的對比解碼方法通過比較原始和擾動視覺輸入的預測來減輕這一問題，但現有方法要麼應用全局擾動，可能改變有用的視覺證據，要麼在每個解碼步驟中引入額外的負支路。在本文中，我們觀察到幻覺風險是瞬時且特定於標記的：視覺注意力在生成的標記之間轉移，而某些功能標記則以高信心生成，並不需要對比校準。基於這一觀察，我們提出了對比幻覺感知逐步解碼（CHASD）用於大型視覺-語言模型，這是一個“按需校準”的推理時框架。CHASD使用不確定性驅動的信心閘來激活對比支路，僅當下一個標記的最大概率低於閾值時，並通過注意力引導的當前顯著視覺標記的局部擾動來構建負支路。這一設計減少了不必要的負支路前向傳遞，同時保留了高信心步驟的原始分佈。對POPE、AMBER、MME、MMHal-Bench和CHAIR的實驗表明，CHASD在強大的無訓練基準上提高了與幻覺相關的指標，並具有競爭性的推理效率。
2605.23344.author: Xiaoyi Huang et.al.
2605.23344.authors: Xiaoyi Huang, Kejia Zhang, Zhiming Luo
